issues_found: Extracted content is severely truncated (289 words) - contains only opening introductory remarks from a 10-page speech
Full PDF speech (893kb, 10 pages) was not included in the RSS extraction, leaving substantive policy content unavailable
Cannot assess hawkish/dovish classification beyond the neutral framing evident in introductory text
Record accurately reflects content limitations but provides minimal archival value without full speech text
human_review_reason: Source extraction is critically incomplete. The RSS feed provided only introductory framing remarks (~289 words) from what is a 10-page speech. The record honestly acknowledges this limitation. While the metadata extraction (speaker identity, role, event, date, personal views disclaimer) is accurate, the substantive policy content needed for meaningful market catalyst analysis is missing. Human decision required on whether to: (a) reject as too thin to archive, (b) accept with low confidence noting incomplete extraction, or (c) flag for re-ingestion of full PDF before archival.
